root.name: AIVR FARM NODE
root.description: Dedicated AI Farm worker node. Connects to farm via Cloudflare gateway, receives commands, runs inference, earns tokens.

children.name: CORE.LLM
children.description: Local LLM inference using CactusLM SDK, controlled by farm commands.

children.name: MODEL.DOWNLOAD
children.description: Farm-commanded model download with progress reporting.

children.name: MODEL.LOAD
children.description: Farm-commanded model load/unload with configurable context size.

children.name: INFERENCE.SYNC
children.description: Non-streaming inference: farm sends messages, node returns full response + usage.

children.name: INFERENCE.STREAM
children.description: Streaming inference: node sends token chunks back to farm via WebSocket.

children.name: FARM.CONNECTION
children.description: WebSocket connection to AI Farm via Cloudflare gateway with auto-reconnect.

children.name: FARM.AUTO_LOGIN
children.description: Auto-connect on app start with persistent node ID.

children.name: FARM.HEARTBEAT
children.description: 15-second heartbeat with stats (uptime, tokens, speed, model).

children.name: FARM.RECONNECT
children.description: Exponential backoff auto-reconnect (1s to 32s) on disconnect.

children.name: FARM.COMMAND_QUEUE
children.description: Sequential command processing to prevent concurrent model ops.

children.name: TOKEN.ECONOMY
children.description: Token earnings tracking and reporting to farm.

children.name: TOKEN.TRACKING
children.description: Per-request token usage (in/out) with cumulative totals and speed.

children.name: TOKEN.REPORTING
children.description: Real-time token reporting to farm for credit/exchange.

children.name: TOKEN.EARNINGS_DISPLAY
children.description: Prominent earnings display on status dashboard.

children.name: DEVICE.CAPABILITIES
children.description: Hardware profiling: CPU cores, RAM, storage, OS — sent to farm for routing.

children.name: INTERFACE.DASHBOARD
children.description: Read-only status dashboard: connection, model, earnings, stats, logs.

children.name: PLATFORM.ANDROID
children.description: Android support with wake lock, foreground service permissions, battery optimization bypass.

statusDefinitions.PARTIAL: Some parts working; not fully completed or validated.
